title: cyperus pumilus var. mutica
intro: Cyperus pumilus var. mutica, also known as dwarf papyrus or short spike flatsedge, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyperus pumilus var. mutica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are often used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be used to treat various health issues.
